meta_description: Metal Kultur Kollektiv e.V. — association for metal culture, community, and live music.
hero_subtitle: We celebrate loud music, respectful solidarity, and the local scene.
hero_hint: More content is coming — check back soon.
page_about_body: Learn more about Metal Kultur Kollektiv e.V., our goals, and the people behind it — content will be added soon.
page_metalparty_body: Information about the Metalparty, dates, and how it works — details will be added here.
page_members_body: Want to join the collective? Fill in the application below — we will get back to you about next steps. Required fields are marked in the form.
members_accept_statutes: I acknowledge the association’s statutes and accept them.
members_accept_statutes_note: A link to the statutes will be added once they are published.
members_accept_privacy_tail: and consent to the processing of my data to handle this application.
members_error_email: Please enter a valid email address.
members_error_birthdate: Please enter a valid date of birth (not in the future).
members_error_accept_statutes: Please confirm that you acknowledge the statutes.
members_error_accept_privacy: Please consent to the privacy policy.
members_form_notice: Your details are used to process your membership application. If no automated endpoint is configured on the server, your email client will open after submit with a pre-filled message — send it, or use the contact routes listed in the imprint.
members_form_success_webhook: Thank you! Your application was submitted. We will get back to you.
members_form_success_mailto_hint: Open your email app with the pre-filled message and send it. If nothing opens, use the button below or the imprint contact details.
members_form_error_remote: We could not submit your application right now. Please try again later or contact us directly.
page_pictures_body: Impressions from events and meetups — a gallery will be added here.
cookie_banner_lead: We use cookies and local storage where required to run this site. You may allow additional categories — no extra tracking services are connected at the moment.
cookie_banner_more: For details, see the privacy policy.
cookie_dialog_intro: Choose which optional categories we may use. Necessary storage (for example saving your choice) is always on.
cookie_cat_necessary_desc: Stores your consent and technically required data for the website.
cookie_cat_functional_desc: Comfort or extended settings (no additional third-party services at the moment).
cookie_cat_analytics_desc: Helps us understand how the site is used (not active yet).
cookie_cat_marketing_desc: For personalised content or ads (not active yet).
footer_social_instagram_aria: Metal Kultur Kollektiv on Instagram (opens in a new tab)
footer_social_discord_aria: Metal Kultur Kollektiv on Discord (opens in a new tab)
